attacking_style: Proactive attacker who moves from GC groups when not obligated, targeting time gaps for position defense. Shows willingness to engage in quality breakaways on high-mountain stages rather than waiting for final climbs.
team_tactics: Functions as tempo-setter for team leader on hardest stages, performing domestique duties on decisive climbs. Granted freedom to join breakaways and attack for own GC position when tactical window opens.
terrain_preference: High-mountain stages with multiple climbs suit him best, showing strongest legs late in Grand Tours (Tourmalet performance). Struggles most on final/steepest summit finishes, particularly early in three-week races.
vulnerability: Early Grand Tour struggles evident—suffered and distanced on final climbs in opening week. Pure summit finish climbing against pure climbers exposes limitations compared to tempo-setting and breakaway riding.
key_patterns: Improving form trajectory within Grand Tours; weak early, strong late in race progression.
Performs tempo-setting domestique role on hardest stages despite young age and neo-pro status.
Tactically mature: attacks for GC defense without obligation, understands positioning value beyond stage wins.
Favors quality breakaways over GC group sitting, proactive racing style for position consolidation.
form_trajectory: positive: Clear improvement curve within Vuelta 2023—struggled early stages but delivered strong tempo work and breakaway presence in final week, showing Grand Tour adaptation
